title: Lead Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
